response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed systems expertise, including event-driven architectures and low-latency systems, which aligns with parts of the role. However, his experience lacks direct relevance to fintech, regulated environments, or agentic AI systems at scale. His leadership experience is primarily in smaller teams or as a founder, and his AI focus is recent and limited to MCP and agentic workflows. The gap in domain-specific experience and executive-scale leadership weighs heavily against his candidacy.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise (event-driven architectures, low-latency systems, microservices)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Proven engineering leadership in scaling teams and improving processes (TDD, CI/CD, pairing at RIDE Capital)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech, regulated environments, or high-stakes commercial AI systems
Limited exposure to agentic AI systems in production; recent AI work appears prototype-level rather than operational
Lacks executive-scale leadership experience (no clear track record scaling teams beyond 10-20 engineers or interfacing with boards)
